query:
-- Ver todos os responsáveis financeiros da PACSML (unit_id=210001)
SELECT fru.id, fru.unit_id, fru.financial_responsible_id, fr.legal_name, fru.starts_at, fru.ends_at
FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.financial_responsible_id
WHERE fru.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY fru.starts_at DESC;
